title: AMAS governance baseline for ATTICUS supercell use
content: AMAS is currently represented as v2.0-draft and is the governance anchor for ATTICUS cross-model memory. The doctrine now explicitly separates governance core, runtime binding, and conformance profiles, while preserving the four-tier authority model of CANONICAL, OPERATOR, SESSION, and INFERRED.
context_summary: Durable AMAS baseline cell for ATTICUS supercell use. Captures the current governance split and preserves the active authority-model frame for cross-model memory operations.
